2.text: Soft tissue density measuring 2.5 cm in the posterior segment of the right lung containing calcifications in the subpleural area

3.text: 7 mm diameter nodule in the posterior segment of the right lung

4.text: 15 mm diameter nodule in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung

5.text: Atelectasis in the middle lobe of the right lung

7.text: Fibrotic changes in the apical segment of the right lung and the apicoposterior segment of the left lung

8.text: Subcentimeter calcified nodules in the apical segment of the right lung and the apicoposterior segment of the left lung

9.text: Minimal pleural effusion in the right lung with adjacent passive atelectasis

10.text: Areas of increased ground-glass density in the upper lobes of both lungs, more prominent on the left
